title: papaver gorgoneum subsp. gorgoneum
intro: Papaver gorgoneum subsp. gorgoneum is a species of poppy, a flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. This plant contains a range of bioactive compounds with potential medicinal properties, including alkaloids and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Papaver gorgoneum subsp. gorgoneum are thought to provide a variety of health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as potential analgesic and sedative properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as tinctures and infusions, may be used to support the treatment of various health conditions, although further research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
